qa_pair.question: How many pages are in three-pages.pdf?
How many pages are in five-pages.pdf?
If you merge three-pages.pdf and five-pages.pdf, in that order, into a new file, how many pages does the merged result have?
Extract the pages at zero-based indexes 0 and 2 from five-pages.pdf into a new file. How many pages does that file have?
Merge five-pages.pdf followed by three-pages.pdf, then from that merged file extract only its first two pages. How many pages does the final file have?
Rotate every page of five-pages.pdf by 90 degrees into a new file. How many pages does the rotated file have?
Build an exhibit binder using three-pages.pdf as the main document and five-pages.pdf as a single exhibit labeled "Exhibit A", with no slip sheets. How many pages does the binder have?
Run the e-filing preflight for the florida jurisdiction pack on letter-portrait.pdf. What is the value of the confirmedReady field?
Run the e-filing preflight for the florida jurisdiction pack on letter-portrait.pdf. Does the report list at least one unverified check? Answer yes or no.
Run the e-filing preflight for the florida jurisdiction pack on legal-size.pdf. Does the letter-portrait page-size check have a status of "pass"? Answer yes or no.
